title: The Arkton SMP
description: The Arkton is a modded Minecraft SMP server. This modpack is built just for the server for you to load and connect to play with others. The Arkton is a great server if you’re looking for a friendly and welcoming community.
body:
The Arkton is a modded Minecraft SMP server. This modpack is built just for the server for you to load and connect to play with others. The Arkton is a great server if you’re looking for a friendly and welcoming community.

Our server and modpack are designed to enrich gameplay without overwhelming it. On our server, you’ll find enhanced building and crafting systems, with mods that let you create intricate contraptions, advanced rail systems, and even powered tools like jetpacks. Farming and cooking are more rewarding, thanks to expanded mechanics that introduce new crops, recipes, and tools. Exploring the world is more exciting, with waystones for quick travel and new animals that bring life to the environment. Combat and equipment customization get a boost with a variety of bows, arrows, and upgrades to netherite gear.

For builders, we’ve included tools to make projects smoother, like tree harvesting, modular storage, and decorative blocks to add detail and personality to your creations. Behind the scenes, performance enhancements ensure a smooth, lag-free experience, even on large builds or in bustling areas. The modpack also adds small touches like improved character animations, custom accessories, and detailed textures for mobs, making the game feel alive. Whether you’re a seasoned builder, a dedicated adventurer, or someone who loves tinkering with machinery, The Arkton SMP has something to enhance your Minecraft journey.

We have our forum and Discord available for community interaction as well as support or questions about the modpack as needed.
https://forum.thearkton.com
